flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Diablo Valley College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($570 → $738).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Diablo Valley College fell 20% between 2009 and 2010 (14.0% → 11.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Diablo Valley College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Diablo Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
